game_name: Battletoads & Double Dragon: The Ultimate Team

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Used with specialized attacks (Swingin' Size Thirteens, BT Bashing Ball)
Risk/reward mechanic - can fall and lose life if enemies step on fingers
No Way Back Thwack attack - specialized movement-based combat
Major gameplay paradigm shift from beat 'em up to space shooter
Transition back to beat 'em up after shooter sequence
Final level 7 features Dark Queen boss

typical_tension_triggers: Enemy finger-stepping hazard during hanging sections
Incoming asteroid/mine patterns in Level 4 shooter
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty with major paradigm shift at midpoint (Level 4 genre transition from beat 'em up to shooter); front-loaded beat 'em up content (Levels 1-3), middle shooter interlude (Level 4), then return to beat 'em up with boss gauntlet (Levels 5-7)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces basic combat and rope mechanics in Level 1 (ship tail exterior); establishes foundational beat 'em up patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Levels 2-3 increase enemy density and complexity through ship interior corridors and base; Level 4 introduces radically different shooter mechanics as difficulty spike
difficulty_curve.late_game: Level 5 returns to beat 'em up but with accumulated skill requirements; Levels 6-7 are pure boss encounters with no wave combat
notable_spikes: Level 4: Genre shift to shooter introduces new control paradigm and enemy patterns (asteroids, mines, UFOs)
Level 6: Shadow Boss encounter after shooter interlude
Level 7: Final Dark Queen boss requiring mastery of all prior mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear progression through distinct spatial zones: exterior (tail) → interior (corridors) → interior (base) → exterior (spacecraft) → missile hull → boss arenas
Each level emphasizes specific movement/combat mechanics: Level 1 basic combat, Levels 2-3 rope/hanging, Level 4 shooter, Levels 5-7 boss navigation
Players must complete all 7 levels with only 3 continues total; in 2-player mode, one player's death restarts the entire level, creating cooperative pressure
Platform edge hanging introduces falling mechanic tied to enemy behavior (enemies stepping on fingers) - creates risk/reward tension during rope sequences
